zh-CN.name: 鲨鱼
zh-CN.intro: 鲨鱼是一种生活在大海里的鱼，它身体很长，有着尖尖的牙齿和有力的尾巴。鲨鱼游得很快，喜欢吃小鱼和小虾。

story.title: 🦈小鲨鱼找朋友
story.body: 小鲨鱼鲨鲨住在大海里，它每天游来游去，但觉得有点孤单。一天，鲨鲨看到一群小鱼在礁石边玩耍。鲨鲨游过去说：“我能和你们一起玩吗？”小鱼们看到鲨鲨的尖牙齿，有点害怕，都游走了。鲨鲨很难过，它想：“也许我不该吓到它们。”这时，一只小海龟游过来说：“鲨鲨，你的牙齿看起来很厉害，但你其实很温柔。”鲨鲨点点头。小海龟和鲨鲨一起玩，它们在海草里捉迷藏。鲨鲨用尾巴轻轻拨水，小海龟咯咯笑。从那以后，鲨鲨有了好朋友，再也不孤单了。

knowledge.title: 鲨鱼为什么一直游动？
knowledge.body: 鲨鱼需要不停地游动，让水流过自己的腮，这样才能呼吸到水里的氧气。如果鲨鱼停下来，可能会沉到海底，所以它总是游来游去。

en.name: Shark
en.intro: A shark is a big fish that lives in the ocean. It has a long body, sharp teeth, and a strong tail. Sharks swim very fast and like to eat small fish.

story.title: 🦈Little Shark Looks for Friends
story.body: Sharky the little shark lived in the big blue ocean. Every day he swam around, but he felt a little lonely. One day, Sharky saw a group of small fish playing near a coral reef. He swam over and said, "Can I play with you?" The small fish saw his sharp teeth and got scared. They swam away quickly. Sharky felt sad. Just then, a little sea turtle came and said, "Sharky, your teeth look sharp, but you are really gentle." Sharky nodded. The little turtle and Sharky became friends. They played hide-and-seek in the seaweed. Sharky used his tail to make gentle splashes, and the turtle giggled. From that day on, Sharky was never lonely again.

knowledge.title: Why do sharks keep swimming?
knowledge.body: Sharks need to keep swimming so that water flows over their gills. This helps them breathe underwater. If a shark stops swimming, it might sink. That's why sharks swim all the time.
